name: Camelot Park and Community Center
description: Camelot Park and Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chesapeake, VA. There are 4 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Deep Creek Community Center
description: Deep Creek Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chesapeake, VA. There are 5 hard courts. 2 are outdoors and 3 are indoors.
